children.innerHTML: We're a four-person studio working with founders and product teams across three time zones. No account managers, no handoffs — the people you meet on the first call do the work.

attributes.alt: The Mono studio team at work

children.innerHTML: Every engagement runs in two-week sprints with a working review every Friday. You see real screens, real type, and real motion from week one — not a strategy deck with a mood board stapled to it.
We cap the studio at three clients at a time. When we're booked, we're booked.
Naming to launch-ready brand in six weeks.
Embedded design for one product, one team.
Motion that makes the announcement the product.

meta_description: Mono is a four-person design studio. Small studio, sharp work.
name: mono_about
